summary: Added flock+mktemp to update-task-status.sh critical section, mktemp to postflight-workflow.sh (3 writes), and atomic Python tempfile writes to skill-base.sh — eliminating last-write-wins corruption for concurrent state.json writes

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering flock locking in update-task-status.sh, mktemp for all 3 scripts, and Python atomic write pattern
